violations.text: Various deli meat and cheese was observed being held past its disposition date. Deli meat and cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

A written consumer advisory is not provided to the consumer at the seafood department, informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Consumer advisory was printed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The Dairy walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
The meat walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of ice-build up. Establishment is to service unit and remove ice. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

Pre packed mac and cheese broccoli cheddar and chicken soup was observed held at was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment voluntarily disposed of food items. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

ROP fish items and non fish items (soup) was observed held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Manufacturer specification noted food items to be held at 32-38 Degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. ROP fish items were voluntarily disposed of, non fish items were embargoed. Establishment to reach out to manufacturer for letter to determine safety of food at 41 DF. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Cheese was observed held past date or disposition. Cheese items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The consumer advisory provided for sushi does not disclose which food items are raw or undercooked. The seafood counter is lacking a consumer advisory. Corrective action - a consumer advisory must be added to the seafood counter and to the packaged sushi containers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2024

The label on the sushi specified the item was cooked. Inspector observed item to be raw. Establishment must work with, sushi provider to add consumer advisory to menu, and ensure product is being properly labeled. Food items were pulled to be returned to supplier. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Gloves were stored on an unclean surface (by hand sink) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the bakery mixer, and the produce open air carrot case have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
The coving under the deli case is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2023
